groupings.title: Orchestration
groupings.description: Single-command orchestrators that route natural-language tasks through the full engineering chain.

groupings.title: Delegation backends
groupings.description: Pluggable backend agents that do the actual work — Codex, MiniMax, Gemini, MetaGPT.

groupings.title: Multi-agent teams
groupings.description: Boss-mode frameworks that spawn specialized agents (scout, oracle, librarian, reviewer, sentinel, visionary) in parallel.

groupings.title: Tooling
groupings.description: Scaffolders and CLI generators for the supersystem itself.

groupings.title: Delegate skills
groupings.description: Delegate a bounded coding task to a CLI implementer agent (Grok, Codex, OpenCode, Kimi, AGY), then review the diff and commit it yourself. Wired to `dt delegate <agent>`.

groupings.title: Companion frameworks
groupings.description: Methodology + UI quality + metric-driven iteration + memory layers that compose under mavis-ship.
